slack_summary: Your calendar is completely clear today — ideal for deep work on the two open Evals tickets. Top priorities: push AE-744 (Justification UX) forward and draft the no-ground-truth design doc for AE-1079. Also critical: fix broken Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so you regain visibility into escalations and product metrics. Zero meetings today.
